misc: The phenomenon called 'Okkotoberfest' was named after his alcohol-induced condition in a past Hector event
biography: Okko, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, hails from Hirsala Golf and has graced this tournament on five occasions. Although he will not be participating in Hector Trophée 2026, there is always the possibility that he might join at the last minute.

With one Hector Trophée victory under his belt, Okko's performances have been a mix of brilliance and, at times, challenges. It is no secret that Okko has had back problems throughout his career, which have occasionally impacted his performance.

Okko is also known for his vibrant personality and his ability to bring levity to the competition. In fact, the phenomenon known as 'Okkotoberfest' was named after his alcohol-induced condition during a past Hector event, a testament to his memorable presence both on and off the course.
